    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]

        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]

SELECT [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[TableNumber], [o1].[StatusId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[UpdatedAt], [o1].[Description], [o0].[OrderItemId], [o0].[FoodItemId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], [o0].[FoodName], [o0].[FoodImageUrl]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o1]

WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
    SELECT [a].[value]
    FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
)

FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]

) AS [o1]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [o1].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o1].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o1].[OrderId]

SELECT [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[TableNumber], [o1].[StatusId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[UpdatedAt], [o1].[Description], [o0].[OrderItemId], [o0].[FoodItemId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], [o0].[FoodName], [o0].[FoodImageUrl]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )

) AS [o1]

ORDER BY [o1].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o1].[OrderId]

SELECT [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[TableNumber], [o1].[StatusId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[UpdatedAt], [o1].[Description], [o0].[OrderItemId], [o0].[FoodItemId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], [o0].[FoodName], [o0].[FoodImageUrl]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o1]

    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]

) AS [o1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[TableNumber], [o1].[StatusId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[UpdatedAt], [o1].[Description], [o0].[OrderItemId], [o0].[FoodItemId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], [o0].[FoodName], [o0].[FoodImageUrl]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )

) AS [o1]

ORDER BY [o1].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o1].[OrderId]

        SELECT [a].[value]

) AS [o1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[TableNumber], [o1].[StatusId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[UpdatedAt], [o1].[Description], [o0].[OrderItemId], [o0].[FoodItemId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], [o0].[FoodName], [o0].[FoodImageUrl]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[TableNumber], [o].[StatusId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[Description]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o].[StatusId] IN (
        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o1]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [o1].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o1].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o1].[OrderId]
